theorem:  mergesort_permut
sample:   3
attempt:  fix_5

[proof]
intro t
exact lemma_hint_24 (l := l) (t := t)

[lean error]
location:
      intro t
      exact lemma_hint_24 (l := l) (t := t)
     ^
error: Type mismatch
  lemma_hint_24 l t
has type
  count1 l t = count1 l t
but is expected to have type
  count1 (mergesort l) t = count1 l t
